title: Aigostar 100W LED Work Light, 9000LM Job Site Light, Plug in Folding FloodLight with 13ft Wire & Switch, Portable Loft Construction Workman Lights 240V Mains Powered IP65 Waterproof
features: Long Cable with Switch: The power cord of Aigostar flood lights with plug is quite long(4M/13FT), you can maneuver it around a large room with ease. In addition to lengthening the cables, we also waterproofed the switch (The switches of other brands of work lights are not waterproof). If your socket doesn't have a switch and you don't want to constantly unplug your work light, or socket is far away from where you want to use the work light, then choose this long cable with switch version.

Aigostar Work Lamps: In addition to this long cable with switch version work light, we also offer two other versions. If you need to use it with a tripod in a professional setting, you can choose our tripod model. If you don't have special needs, the regular standard version can meet most of the use scenarios. Each version is also available in different brightness levels. You can choose the right work light according to your purpose of use, the occasion of use, and the area of the place of use.

Super Bright Work Site Light: 9000Lm and 100W makes the work light extremely energy efficient and amazingly bright. You have no idea how bright this thing is. It's the brightest work light on the market currently. If you use it for workshop or garden, with a flood of nice 6500K cool light, it will light up every square inch of your area. Even dark room will turn to as bright as in daytime. If you use it for outdoor construction, it'll make worksite around much safer and be a boon to workmen.

360°Rotation: Aigostar portable led flood light can be rotated 360°. Lamp is fixed to the stand via 2 thumb screws which can be slackened off. By operating the four twist screws on either side you can change the angle of both the stand and also the light. You can pivot and tilt it. Flexible adjustments to get the right angle to work under. This enables you can easily direct the light to where you need exactly.

High Quality: The bracket of Aigostar construction lights is made of aluminum alloy, temperature, and corrosion resistance, speed up heat dissipation. The premium ultra-thin body also ensure better heat dissipation performance, makes the main powered work light won't get hot like older lights do. It’s equipped with a strong robust 13.12ft cable. Fully sealed protection design, IP65 rating guarantees it operates correctly on construction sites in rain, snow, heat, or cold.
